meta.title: Explore Jobs | Pro-Tech Staffing
meta.description: Browse open manufacturing, electronics, warehouse, and industrial positions across Texas, Florida, Arizona, and California. Apply today with Pro-Tech Staffing.

hero.heading: Find a Job That Fits You
hero.description: Looking for your next role in manufacturing, electronics, or light industrial? We're actively placing workers at companies across Texas, Florida, Arizona, and California. Find an open position below or apply to our talent pool and let us match you.

board.heading: Browse Current Openings
board.description: Search available roles by location, industry, or keyword. New positions are posted daily.

apply.title: Apply
apply.desc: Submit your application online or visit one of our 6 offices. It takes less than 10 minutes.

review.title: Review
review.desc: Our recruiters review your experience, skills, and availability to find the best match.

interview.title: Interview
interview.desc: Meet with a local recruiter who understands the work and can answer your questions.

work.title: Work
work.desc: Get placed at a job site, start earning, and build toward long-term opportunities.

whyProTech.heading: Why Work with Pro-Tech Staffing
whyProTech.body1: We don't just fill shifts — we match people to roles where they can succeed. With 30 years in industrial staffing, our recruiters know the work, the employers, and the markets.
whyProTech.body2: From temp assignments to direct-hire positions, we help workers across 6 US cities find roles that fit their experience, schedule, and career goals.

testimonial.quote: Pro-Tech got me placed within 48 hours. The recruiter actually listened to what I was looking for and matched me with the right company.
testimonial.name: Manufacturing Worker
testimonial.role: Placed via Pro-Tech Staffing, Richardson TX

whatWeDo.heading: What can we actually do for you?

fastPlacement.title: Fast Placement
fastPlacement.desc: Most candidates are placed within 36 hours of applying. We move fast because employers need you now.

roleMatching.title: Role Matching
roleMatching.desc: We match your skills and experience to the right position — not just the first opening available.

tempToHire.title: Temp-to-Hire Paths
tempToHire.desc: Many of our positions convert to permanent roles. Start as a temp and earn your way to a full-time offer.

localRecruiters.title: Local Recruiters
localRecruiters.desc: Our recruiters live in the markets they serve. They know the employers, the facilities, and the work.

training.title: Training & Certification
training.desc: Access IPC certification training (IPC-610, IPC-620, J-STD-001) through our in-house certified trainers.

weeklyPay.title: Weekly Pay
weeklyPay.desc: Get paid every week. No waiting around for monthly checks or delayed processing.

cta.heading: Don't see the right job?
cta.description: Submit your application and our recruiters will match you with opportunities as they open up.
